markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To align on the future of the GrowthX-Fleet partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Confirmed:** Fleet will continue the partnership, leveraging GrowthX's platform to scale its content engine and support a new enterprise go-to-market motion.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2294.0)
  - [**Quality Assurance:** GrowthX's platform uses "artifacts" (e.g., style guides, docs) to ground AI content in Fleet's specific context, addressing concerns about technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Reviewer Enablement:** A key blocker is vague feedback (e.g., "this is bad"). An upcoming workshop will educate Fleet's technical reviewers on the process and how to provide actionable feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Future Scope:** The partnership will expand to include refreshing existing content and creating long-form guides, contingent on establishing a successful new content cadence first.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2447.0)

## Topics

### Fleet's Strategic Shift & Content Needs

  - [**Background:** Fleet was founded by GitLab's CEO to build an open-source alternative to proprietary MDM (e.g., Jamf), inspired by GitLab's open-core model.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Fleet is shifting from a bottoms-up, engineer-first GTM to also target large enterprise IT deals.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This requires a more structured content engine to support a new sales leader and enterprise pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**Content Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Attribution:** High website traffic lacks source attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Strategy:** No long-term, cohesive thought leadership plan exists.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Targeting:** Content needs to attract the *right* people for the *right* terms (e.g., "multi-platform MDM"), not just branded searches like "FleetDM."](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### GrowthX's Platform & Quality Assurance

  - [**Platform Overview:** GrowthX's agentic platform (built on a "workflows as code" framework) is designed for scalable, high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Quality Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
    1.  **Contextual Artifacts:** Distilled knowledge from Fleet's docs and style guides.
          - [**Purpose:** Ground AI in Fleet's specific voice and technical details.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
    2.  [**Deep Researcher:** An agent that plans research, pulls from high-quality sources, and uses an LLM-as-a-judge to evaluate findings.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
    3.  [**Fact Checker:** Verifies content passage by passage against evidence, catching subtle inaccuracies (e.g., "must" vs. "are strongly encouraged").](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [**Pricing Model:** The platform model delivers content at a lower cost (\~$0.10/word vs. \~$0.50–$1.00/word for human writers) with higher speed and scale.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)

### Addressing Reviewer Feedback

  - [**Problem:** Vague feedback from technical experts (e.g., "this is a bad article") is unactionable and stalls progress.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Reviewers lack context on the content strategy and the platform's advanced process.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [**Solution:** An educational workshop for reviewers.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Explain the strategic value of content and the platform's process.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
      - [**Goal:** Enable reviewers to provide specific, actionable feedback that improves the system's artifacts over time.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Future Content Scope

  - [**Long-Form Guides (e.g., white papers):**](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2447.0)
      - [**Feasible:** If Fleet provides source material (e.g., transcripts, expert interviews) to ground the content in a unique, expert voice.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2644.0)
      - [**Not Feasible:** As generic summaries of the web, which would lack authority.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
  - [**Existing Content Refresh:**](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
      - [**Feasible:** A core capability for updating outdated, shallow, or inaccurate content.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX runs a URL through its Deep Researcher, then uses the findings to enrich the original piece.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
      - [**Timing:** Will begin after a new content cadence is successfully established.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik O'Brien:** Schedule a 1-hour workshop for Fleet's technical reviewers.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2883.0)
  - [**Marcel Santilli:** Lead the workshop to explain the content strategy, platform process, and how to provide actionable feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
  - [**Ashish & John:** Provide a list of specific topics for the workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2883.0)
  - [**All:** Reconvene after the workshop to review progress and plan the next phase of the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/PYXaNQ95y_cyJC54hPUx6HzSKGtPJaYn?tab=summary&timestamp=2883.0)
